notes: V-Bucks underwent major repricing on 19 March 2026. All prices below reflect POST-repricing values. Item shop rotates daily at 00:00 UTC. Specific items on sale on 21 April 2026 not captured (requires live page scrape).

v_bucks_purchase_tiers.change_type: Fewer V-Bucks for same dollar price (effective ~20-25% increase in cost-per-V-Buck)

item_shop_pricing_by_rarity_and_type.note: Standard V-Bucks prices for shop items have NOT changed - only the purchase packs give fewer V-Bucks, making items effectively more expensive in real money.

outfits_skins.note: Some collaboration/special skins priced differently (e.g. Laufey skin ~1800 V-Bucks)

battle_pass.note: Bonus Rewards V-Bucks removed entirely. Break-even if fully completed.

fortnite_crew_monthly.note: Subscription. Crew pack skin is exclusive.

recent_featured_items.name: Sakara Skin
recent_featured_items.note: April 2026 Fortnite Crew pack. Aquatic themed. ~$10 standalone value estimate.

economy_notes: Daily rotating item shop - items cycle in and out, creating urgency/FOMO
Pure cosmetic - no gameplay advantage from purchases
V-Bucks are the sole premium currency
March 2026 repricing was a ~20-25% effective price increase via reduced V-Buck quantities
Epic justified the increase citing 'escalating operational expenses'
Collaboration skins (Marvel, music artists, etc.) often priced at premium tiers
Bundles offer discount vs buying items individually
Item shop tracks on fortnite.gg provide full historical pricing data
